---
layout: cv
title: Jared Bean
---
Economist, Statatician, Beast.


<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jared-bean-7b2683253/">Jared Bean's LinkedIn Profile</a>


## Currently

Studying at BYU ID

### Specialized in

Statistics, Economics, Data Science, Accounting


### Research interests

Education, Judo, and Bjj


## Education

Highschool
Some Collage


## Occupation
Getting good grades in school





<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2024 -->
